title: rondeletia neriifolia var. calcicola
intro: Rondeletia neriifolia var. calcicola is a variety of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to the Caribbean and Central America. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rondeletia neriifolia var. calcicola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of this plant can be used in the form of tea, infusions, or topical applications, allowing for a range of potential uses in natural remedies.
